name: ACPX Runtime
description: Embedded ACP runtime backend with plugin-owned session and transport management.

command.description: Command to run the MCP server

args.description: Arguments to pass to the command

env.description: Environment variables for the MCP server

cwd.label: Default Working Directory
cwd.help: Default working directory for embedded ACP session operations when not set per session.

stateDir.label: State Directory
stateDir.help: Directory used for embedded ACP session state and persistence.

permissionMode.label: Permission Mode
permissionMode.help: Default permission policy for embedded ACP runtime prompts.

nonInteractivePermissions.label: Non-Interactive Permission Policy
nonInteractivePermissions.help: Policy when interactive permission prompts are unavailable.

pluginToolsMcpBridge.label: Plugin Tools MCP Bridge
pluginToolsMcpBridge.help: Default off. When enabled, inject the built-in OpenClaw plugin-tools MCP server into embedded ACP sessions so ACP agents can call plugin-registered tools.

strictWindowsCmdWrapper.label: Strict Windows cmd Wrapper
strictWindowsCmdWrapper.help: Enabled by default. On Windows, reject unresolved .cmd/.bat wrappers instead of shell fallback. Disable only for compatibility with non-standard wrappers.

timeoutSeconds.label: Prompt Timeout Seconds
timeoutSeconds.help: Optional timeout for each embedded runtime turn.

queueOwnerTtlSeconds.label: Queue Owner TTL Seconds
queueOwnerTtlSeconds.help: Reserved compatibility field for future queued embedded prompt ownership.

mcpServers.label: MCP Servers
mcpServers.help: Named MCP server definitions to inject into embedded ACP session bootstrap. Each entry needs a command and can include args and env.

agents.label: Agent Commands
agents.help: Optional per-agent command overrides for the embedded ACP runtime.
